splits.title: Guide Lessons for June - Literature and Social Service
splits.start_boundary: GUIDE LESSONS FOR JUNE 213 LESSON III

files.notes: This file contains three distinct sections: 1) Notes from the Field by Amy Brown Lyman covering civic improvement activities across various stakes, 2) Guide Lessons for June covering Lessons I and II (Theology/Testimony and Work/Business), and 3) The continuation of Guide Lessons covering Lessons III and IV (Literature on Amy Lowell and Social Service on intellectual problems of childhood). The literature lesson includes several complete poems by Amy Lowell.
